name: Nonstick Aluminized Steel Cooling Rack Gray - Figmint™: Oven-Safe, Dishwasher-Safe, Made Without PTFE
description:
This Nonstick Aluminized Steel Cooling Rack from Figmint™ is perfect for baking and cooling a variety of entrees and desserts. Made from wire-reinforced aluminized steel that heats evenly and resists warping, this gray-finish cooling rack features a smooth, easy-to-clean surface for convenient use. The rack is oven safe up to 450 degrees Fahrenheit, so you can also use it for baking, and the dishwasher-safe construction allows for quick and easy cleaning.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
